note: Dispatcher: routes to rowbreak or colbreak based on which of 'col'/'column' or 'row' is supplied. See xlsx/rowbreak.json and xlsx/colbreak.json for the resolved surfaces.

row.description: row index — routes to rowbreak. Add-time only — Set is not supported (re-add to relocate). Get does not surface this back today; use sheet.rowBreaks for the indexed list.

col.description: column index/letter — routes to colbreak. Alias: column. Add-time only — Set is not supported (re-add to relocate). Get does not surface this back today; use sheet.colBreaks for the indexed list.
